Windows "Could Not Find This Item" — When a File or Folder Refuses to Delete

Recently hit a familiar Windows annoyance — try to delete a file or folder, and Windows says "Could not find this item". I've been seeing this since Windows 7, and it's still around on Windows 10. This post covers the two common causes (a process holding the file open vs. disk sector trouble) and the easy ways to fix each.
Common Discord Problems and How to Fix Them
A grab-bag of common Discord issues — can't log in, can't accept invites, no audio, missing DMs from strangers, and more — with fixes for each. I'll keep adding to this list as I run into new ones.
Fix the 'Virtual script not found' Error in a Vue Project

After switching to a newer version of Volar, I opened a new project and got the "Virtual script not found, may missing script lang=\"ts\" / \"allowJs\": true / jsconfig.json.volar" error. So here's a quick note on the problem and how to fix it.
Fixing the 'getInspectorTree' Error When Using VeeValidate in Vue 3

This post is a quick note on how to fix the "An error occurred in hook 'getInspectorTree' with payload" error you get when using VeeValidate. While I'm at it, I'll also cover another oddly behaving VeeValidate issue — the duplicated `name` attribute problem.
Git Filename Case Sensitivity Issues and How to Fix Them
Git treats readme.md and README.md as the same file on macOS or Windows, so renaming silently does nothing. How to reproduce the trap and two clean ways to fix it.
Homebrew zsh: command not found: brew — How I Fixed It

One day brew install just stopped working — zsh told me it couldn't find "brew install", but plain `brew` did show output. This post walks through what was wrong (PATH-related setup against the wrong shell rc file, plus a missing wget dependency), and the steps that actually got brew install back up and running.
Fix the Vue Mustache Flicker With v-cloak
Sometimes a slow network makes Vue render late, and you briefly see the raw Mustache syntax on the page. Not a great look — so here's a quick note on how to fix it.
Fixing "regeneratorRuntime is not defined" When Using Gulp
A quick note on fixing the `regeneratorRuntime is not defined` issue when using gulp-babel.
Fix: All Posts Show Updated Date After Hexo Upgrade or CI Deploy
After upgrading Hexo, every article started showing an "updated" date, even articles I hadn't touched. This post is on how to fix that — marking unmodified posts as updated is confusing for readers.
Teachable Video Shows Blank? Browser Strict Privacy Settings Are the Likely Cause

Some readers told me Teachable videos suddenly stopped playing, but my own browser was fine. Turned out the culprit was their browser's Strict privacy mode. This post walks through the fix in Firefox, Chrome, and Edge, plus the fallback when toggling privacy mode isn't enough.
